prompt: Inicializa o projeto Colibri do zero. Cria a estrutura de pastas, configura Vite com PWA, Tailwind com as cores certas, e monta o App Shell básico com BottomNav de 5 itens (Timer, Humor, Tarefas, Chat, Perfil). Quero rodar npm run dev e ver a shell funcionando com navegação.
assertions: Folder structure follows App Shell pattern with components/shell/, features/, contexts/, hooks/, lib/
tailwind.config contains Colibri color tokens (colibri-bg #121214, colibri-primary #7C3AED, colibri-surface #1A1A1E)
vite.config.ts includes VitePWA plugin with manifest and workbox runtimeCaching
All feature routes use React.lazy() with Suspense fallback
BottomNav has exactly 5 navigation items (Timer, Humor, Tarefas, Chat, Perfil)
Project builds successfully without errors (npm run build)
